import hashlib
import hmac

from relay.keys import KeyRing, SigningKey
from relay.verifier import verify_delivery


def test_delayed_v2_delivery_survives_rotation_and_query_reordering():
    secret = b"retired-green"
    raw_timestamp = "1700000104000"
    canonical_target = "/events?aud=billing&aud=ops&empty="
    request_target = "/events?aud=ops&empty=&aud=billing"
    payload = b'{"invoice":418}'
    signed = (
        f"{raw_timestamp}\nPATCH\n{canonical_target}\n".encode() + payload
    )
    headers = {
        "X-Relay-Timestamp": raw_timestamp,
        "X-Relay-Key": "green",
        "X-Relay-Signature": hmac.new(
            secret, signed, hashlib.sha256
        ).hexdigest(),
    }
    ring = KeyRing(
        [SigningKey("green", secret, 1699999000, 1700000100)],
        grace_seconds=30,
    )

    accepted = verify_delivery(
        "patch",
        request_target,
        payload,
        headers,
        ring,
        now=1700000105,
        tolerance_seconds=10,
    )
    assert accepted, "the valid delayed v2 delivery was rejected"
